title: Leveraging Population Dynamics to Steer Efficient Search in Large-Scale Combinatorial Optimization
summary: Combinatorial optimization problems pose substantial computational challenges because their feasible solution spaces grow exponentially with problem size. This paper presents a GPU-accelerated augmented Population Annealing Monte Carlo (PAMC) framework for large-scale graph-partitioning problems, with emphasis on Max-Cut and Max-K-Cut. The proposed framework extends conventional PAMC by coupling population-based resampling with two stagnation-driven mechanisms: adaptive temperature control and energy-preserving nonlocal cluster moves. By using population-level optimization history as feedback, these mechanisms regulate the balance between exploration and refinement by reheating stalled populations and enabling collective transitions across locally confined regions of the solution space. Experiments on G-set benchmark instances show that the augmented PAMC framework achieves competitive or lower time-to-solution than reported state-of-the-art baselines on several large Max-Cut instances, while matching or improving solution quality under comparable runtime budgets. The solver also discovers a new best-known solution for the G63 Max-Cut instance and scales to a fully connected 100,000-spin Ising instance. For Max-3-Cut, the same framework establishes new best-known solutions on 36 G-set instances, demonstrating its applicability beyond binary Ising formulations. These results indicate that feedback-controlled population dynamics provide an effective and scalable strategy for steering stochastic search in large-scale combinatorial optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种GPU加速的增强型种群退火蒙特卡洛（PAMC）框架，用于大规模图分割问题（Max-Cut和Max-K-Cut）。该框架通过种群重采样与停滞驱动机制（自适应温度控制、能量保持非局部簇移动）平衡探索与精炼，在G-set基准测试中取得领先结果，并发现了G63实例的新最佳解。
AI.motivation: 组合优化问题的可行解空间随问题规模呈指数增长，现有方法难以在大规模实例上兼顾求解质量和效率。作者旨在开发一种可扩展的随机搜索策略，以解决大规模图分割问题（如Max-Cut和Max-K-Cut）。
AI.method: 提出GPU加速的增强型PAMC框架，核心创新包括：（1）基于种群的并行重采样；（2）两种停滞驱动的自适应机制——自适应温度控制（对停滞种群进行再加热）和能量保持非局部簇移动（实现跨越局部区域的集体态跃迁），利用种群级优化历史作为反馈信号动态调节探索与精炼的平衡。
AI.result: 在G-set基准测试中，该框架在多个大规模Max-Cut实例上实现了与最先进基线相当或更低的求解时间，并在同等运行时间内匹配或提升了求解质量。发现了G63 Max-Cut实例的新最佳解，可扩展至全连接的10万自旋Ising实例。在Max-3-Cut上，为36个G-set实例建立了新的最佳解。
AI.conclusion: 反馈控制的种群动力学为大规模组合优化中的随机搜索提供了一种有效且可扩展的策略，超越了二值Ising公式的局限，证明了该方法在更广泛组合优化问题中的适用性。

title: A Scalable Time-Based Molecular Dynamics Approach for Simulating Single-Bubble Sonoluminesce
summary: We present a scalable time-based molecular dynamics (TBMD) framework for simulating single-bubble sonoluminescence within a hybrid continuum-MD formulation. Unlike prior event-based approaches, which model gas dynamics through instantaneous hard-sphere collisions, the present method integrates continuous Lennard-Jones and damped shifted force Coulomb interactions at each timestep, enabling self-consistent tracking of ionization state and long-range electrostatics throughout the collapse. To bridge the gap between the physical particle count ($N_\mathrm{real}\sim 10^{10}$) and computationally tractable ensemble sizes, we introduce an ensemble particle (EP) scaling formalism that preserves temperature, pressure, and ionization statistics while reducing the simulated particle count by up to four orders of magnitude. Applying the framework to argon under standard single-bubble sonoluminescence driving conditions, we perform a systematic sweep over the ionization model and thermal accommodation coefficient $α_t$, with ensemble sizes up to $N_\mathrm{ensem} = 10^8$ particles. The results establish that ionization is the dominant regulator of peak temperature, reducing $T_\mathrm{max}$ by approximately a factor of two relative to the non-ionizing baseline, while $α_t$ primarily controls the spatially averaged temperature at the collapse minimum. Scalar observables at $N_\mathrm{ensem} = 10^8$, including peak temperature, minimum bubble radius, and maximum wall velocity, are assessed against prior studies to help validate the EP scaling formalism and our hybrid continuum-MD framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可扩展的基于时间的分子动力学（TBMD）框架，用于模拟单泡声致发光。通过引入系综粒子（EP）缩放形式，将模拟粒子数降低四个数量级，同时保持温度、压力和电离统计特性。研究发现电离是峰值温度的主要调控因素（降低约两倍），而热适应系数主要影响塌缩最小半径处的空间平均温度。
AI.motivation: 传统基于事件的方法将气体动力学建模为瞬时硬球碰撞，无法自洽追踪电离态和长程静电相互作用。本文旨在开发一种能够处理连续Lennard-Jones和阻尼移位力Coulomb相互作用的时间步进MD框架，并解决物理粒子数（~10^10）与可计算粒子数之间的量级差距。
AI.method: 1) 构建时间步进MD框架，集成连续LJ和阻尼移位力Coulomb相互作用，在每个时间步自洽追踪电离态和长程静电力。2) 提出系综粒子（EP）缩放形式，在降低模拟粒子数的同时保持温度、压力和电离统计特性。3) 在标准单泡声致发光条件下对氩气进行系统扫描，变化电离模型和热适应系数α_t。
AI.result: 电离是峰值温度的主导调控因素，将T_max相对于非电离基线降低约两倍。α_t主要控制塌缩最小处的空间平均温度。在N_ensem=10^8时，标量可观测量（峰值温度、最小气泡半径、最大壁速度）与先前研究对比，验证了EP缩放形式及混合连续-MD框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的TBMD框架和EP缩放形式能够有效模拟单泡声致发光中的电离动力学和静电相互作用，揭示了电离对峰值温度的关键调控作用，为未来更精确的声致发光模拟提供了可扩展的计算框架。

title: A Neural Surrogate Approach for Simulating Natural Convection Problems
summary: This paper presents a neural surrogate approach for improving the accuracy of natural convection problems simulated with a Boussinesq flow model (incompressible flow with heat transfer). Our approach, based on Fourier neural operators, uses training data consisting of matched pairs of simulations run under the computationally cheaper yet less accurate Boussinesq flow model and a more computationally expensive and more accurate compressible flow model. In both cases, we implement our parallelized simulation codes based on an implicit monolithic mixed finite element method (FEM) approach using the open-source FEniCSx framework. Our implementations are validated against a commercial software package, COMSOL, as well as standard test problems from the literature. We include a careful discussion and analysis of data set generation and present learning results in two and three spatial dimensions. Using compressible flow results as high-fidelity reference solutions, our learning approach, with a single model evaluation per simulation, substantially improves the per-channel accuracy of Boussinesq predictions, with structural similarity (SSIM) close to unity across all flow variables and test distributions and corresponding mean-squared error reductions of one to nearly three orders of magnitude. All code and data is released as open-source.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于傅里叶神经算子的神经代理方法，利用Boussinesq模型（廉价低精度）与可压缩流模型（昂贵高精度）的配对模拟数据，训练模型提升自然对流问题的求解精度。在2D和3D场景下，单次模型评估即可使Boussinesq预测精度大幅提升，SSIM接近1，MSE降低1-3个数量级。
AI.motivation: 自然对流问题中，Boussinesq模型计算效率高但精度不足，而可压缩流模型精度高但计算成本过高。作者希望找到一种方法，既能保持Boussinesq模型的计算效率，又能获得接近可压缩流模型的预测精度。
AI.method: 基于傅里叶神经算子（FNO）的神经代理方法；使用配对数据（Boussinesq模型输出 + 可压缩流模型输出）进行监督学习；仿真基于隐式 monolithic 混合有限元法，使用FEniCSx开源框架实现并行化代码；模型在2D和3D空间维度上进行训练和评估。
AI.result: 单次模型评估即可显著提升Boussinesq预测的逐通道精度；结构相似性（SSIM）接近1；均方误差（MSE）降低了1到3个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 神经代理方法能有效弥合Boussinesq模型与可压缩流模型之间的精度差距，在保持计算效率的同时大幅提升预测精度。所有代码和数据均已开源，为相关研究提供了可复现的基准。

title: A convolutional neural network surrogate for hierarchical homogenization: fast elastic moduli prediction of digital rocks
summary: Digital rock physics (DRP) aims to estimate effective rock properties (e.g., elastic moduli) directly from 3D micro-CT images. However, direct numerical simulations (DNS) on high-resolution large 3D scans are often computationally prohibitive and severely limit the application of DRP. To address this bottleneck, we combine a lightweight 3D convolutional neural network (CNN) with hierarchical homogenization (HHM) and apply it to determine effective elastic moduli. In this scheme, a large rock image is divided into subcubes. The CNN replaces costly DNS by directly predicting subcube elastic moduli, while HHM upscales subcube-level predictions to the full rock. Using a shared convolutional backbone, we systematically compare three training targets: (i) full anisotropic $6\times6$ stiffness tensors, (ii) isotropic bulk and shear moduli $(K, G)$, and (iii) Hashin--Shtrikman (HS)-normalized factors. Across multiple rock types, all three models agree well with DNS results while substantially reducing the computational cost. Moreover, training from scratch on each rock type is fast enough that transfer learning is unnecessary. Across all three targets, the accuracy is comparable. In our comparative study, the HS-normalized factor offers the best overall speed--accuracy trade-off while guaranteeing physical consistency, making it a convenient default. The isotropic $(K, G)$ target is a slightly more accurate alternative.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将轻量级3D卷积神经网络与层次均匀化方法结合，替代传统直接数值模拟来预测岩石弹性模量，在保持精度的同时大幅降低计算成本。通过比较三种训练目标，发现Hashin-Shtrikman归一化因子在速度-精度权衡上表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 数字岩石物理学中，直接对高分辨率3D微CT图像进行数值模拟计算成本极高，严重限制了其应用。现有方法需要找到更高效的替代方案来估计岩石有效弹性属性。
AI.method: 将大尺寸岩石图像划分为子立方体，使用轻量级3D卷积神经网络预测子立方体的弹性模量，再通过层次均匀化方法将子立方体级别的预测结果上尺度到整个岩石。系统比较了三种训练目标：完整各向异性刚度张量、各向同性体积模量和剪切模量、Hashin-Shtrikman归一化因子。
AI.result: 三种模型在多种岩石类型上的预测结果均与直接数值模拟高度一致，同时显著降低了计算成本。三种训练目标的精度相当，其中HS归一化因子在速度-精度权衡上最优，各向同性(K,G)目标精度略高。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了DRP中的计算瓶颈，且由于训练速度快，无需使用迁移学习。HS归一化因子因其物理一致性和最佳的速度-精度平衡，推荐作为默认选择。

title: ConSolv: Solvent-Conditional Machine Learning Implicit Solvent Potential
summary: Implicit solvent machine learning potentials (MLPs) offer a powerful route to bridging the gap between accuracy and efficiency in molecular simulations. However, existing models have largely focused on aqueous environments, overlooking the diverse and important roles of non-aqueous solvents in areas such as organic synthesis and battery technology. Here, we present ConSolv, a solvent-conditional MLP architecture that explicitly incorporates solvent effects on solute interactions through an attention-based solvent-embedding block. By combining experimental solvation free energy data with ab initio data, we train a single implicit solvent MLP that is transferable across 66 common organic solvents. ConSolv outperforms classical explicit solvent methods and selected ab initio implicit solvent approaches across multiple solvation free energy benchmarks, and demonstrates generalization to unseen solvents. Beyond solvation free energies, the model shows close agreement with experimental nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) data for $γ$-fluorohydrin molecules in chloroform. ConSolv's architecture is readily extensible to broader chemical spaces and alternative training strategies, while its attention-based design supports explainable artificial intelligence (AI) analysis that can help elucidate complex, solvent-dependent molecular interactions.

AI.tldr: ConSolv 提出了一种基于注意力机制的溶剂条件隐式溶剂机器学习势，能够跨66种常见有机溶剂转移，在溶剂化自由能基准上优于经典显式溶剂方法和部分从头算隐式溶剂方法，并泛化到未见溶剂。
AI.motivation: 现有隐式溶剂MLP主要聚焦水溶液环境，忽视了非水溶剂在有机合成、电池技术等领域的重要作用。
AI.method: 提出ConSolv架构，通过注意力机制的溶剂嵌入模块显式编码溶剂效应对溶质相互作用的影响，结合实验溶剂化自由能数据和从头算数据训练单个可转移的隐式溶剂MLP。
AI.result: 在66种常见有机溶剂的溶剂化自由能基准上超越经典显式溶剂方法和部分从头算隐式方法；泛化到未见溶剂；与氯仿中γ-氟氢醇分子的实验NMR数据吻合良好。
AI.conclusion: ConSolv架构易于扩展到更广的化学空间和替代训练策略，其注意力机制设计支持可解释AI分析，有助于阐明复杂的溶剂依赖性分子相互作用。

title: Exactly solvable pair-density wave in topological flat bands from magnetic translation symmetries
summary: Pair-density wave (PDW) superconductors are exotic phases in which Cooper pairs carry finite center-of-mass momentum. Despite a variety of theoretical and experimental reports on PDW states, exact PDW ground states in topological bands have remained elusive. Here we construct exactly solvable models with PDW ground states in topological flat bands using a generalized version of the recently proposed quantum geometric nesting (QGN) framework. Our construction broadly applies to systems with non-commuting magnetic translation symmetries (MTS) and time-reversal symmetry, exemplified by the time-reversal invariant version of the Kapit-Mueller model with two ideal flat Chern bands with opposite Chern number. Our construction thus provides a platform for further studies of band topology and quantum geometry in PDW superconductors.

AI.tldr: 本文通过推广量子几何嵌套（QGN）框架，在拓扑平带中构建了具有精确基态的配对密度波（PDW）超导模型，解决了该领域长期存在的理论难题。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有大量关于PDW态的理论和实验报道，但在拓扑能带中始终缺乏精确的PDW基态解，这限制了对其拓扑性质和量子几何效应的深入研究。
AI.method: 采用广义量子几何嵌套（QGN）框架，利用非对易磁平移对称性和时间反演对称性，在Kapit-Mueller模型的时间反演不变版本中构建了两个Chern数相反的理想平带，从而得到精确可解的PDW基态模型。
AI.result: 成功构建了拓扑平带中具有精确基态的PDW超导模型，该模型适用于具有非对易磁平移对称性和时间反演对称性的系统。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为研究PDW超导体中的能带拓扑和量子几何提供了理想的理论平台。

title: Non-Abelian Anyon Braiding with Quantum-Antidot Interferometry
summary: Conventional Fabry--Perot interferometry accesses only full braids of anyons and therefore cannot directly probe the elementary \(π\)-rotation exchange. Motivated by the recent quantum-antidot proposal for the Abelian anyons, we propose an interferometry for probing the elementary exchanges of non-abelian anyons using two gate-controlled quantum antidots. By tuning two antidots independently, the device realizes distinct cooperative tunnelling processes, which correspond to different braids of non-abelian anyons. For the unresolved local fusion channels, the difference between the interference signals of the single and double cooperative processes allows us to measure the elementary exchange of the non-abelian anyons, providing a direct probe of their non-abelian statistics and topological spins. For the resolved local fusion channels, the double-cooperative process is further distinguished by a reduced interference amplitude. Our work provides a promising and practical route for manipulating and detecting non-abelian braiding with the fundamental fractional statistics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用两个栅控量子反点进行非阿贝尔任意子基本交换干涉测量的方法，通过测量单/双协同隧穿过程的信号差异，直接探测非阿贝尔统计和拓扑自旋。
AI.motivation: 传统法布里-珀罗干涉仪只能探测任意子的完整编织，无法直接测量基本的π旋转交换。最近阿贝尔任意子的量子反点方案启发作者将这一思路扩展到非阿贝尔任意子。
AI.method: 利用两个独立调控的栅控量子反点实现不同的协同隧穿过程，对应非阿贝尔任意子的不同编织方式。通过比较单协同和双协同过程的干涉信号差异来提取基本交换信息。
AI.result: 在未分辨局域融合通道时，信号差异可直接测量非阿贝尔任意子的基本交换、统计性质和拓扑自旋；在分辨融合通道时，双协同过程表现为干涉振幅减小。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为操控和探测非阿贝尔编织及其基本分数统计提供了一条有前景且实用的实验路径。

title: The SU(N) Holstein Model
summary: From the condensed matter physics perspective, the most natural single orbital tight-binding Hamiltonians, and hence the most widely studied, contain two fermionic species, corresponding to spin up and spin down electrons. In cold atom systems, however, SU(N) symmetry, in which $N > 2$ fermionic species reside within a single band, also occurs. In order to understand such experiments, the SU(N) Hubbard model has been increasingly studied. Here we present determinant Quantum Monte Carlo simulations of the SU(N) {\it Holstein} Hamiltonian, in which $N$ fermionic species couple to a single local phonon mode. We show that at half filling it has an insulating charge density wave phase (CDW) at low temperatures, in which empty sites alternate with sites with $N$ particles. We determine the $N=3$ CDW phase diagram in the temperature, $T$, versus electron-phonon coupling, $α$, plane at fixed phonon frequency $ω_0$ and half-filling $ρ=1.5$. The critical temperature $T_c$ for $N=3$ can be as high as twice the maximum attainable for $N=2$. We also obtain the $N$ dependence of $T_c$ for a representative, fixed, $ω_0$ and $α$.

AI.tldr: 本文通过行列式量子蒙特卡洛模拟，研究了SU(N) Holstein哈密顿量中N种费米子与单个局域声子模式的耦合，发现在半填充时存在绝缘电荷密度波相，且N=3时的临界温度最高可达N=2时的两倍。
AI.motivation: 冷原子系统中存在SU(N)对称性（N>2），而传统凝聚态物理中最常见的模型仅涉及两种费米子（自旋上/下）。为了理解SU(N)对称性下的实验，需要对SU(N) Hubbard模型进行扩展研究，但Holstein模型中的SU(N)效应尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 采用行列式量子蒙特卡洛（Determinant Quantum Monte Carlo）模拟方法，研究SU(N) Holstein哈密顿量，其中N种费米子耦合到单个局域声子模式。在固定声子频率ω₀和半填充ρ=1.5的条件下，计算了N=3时温度T与电子-声子耦合α相图中的临界温度T_c，并分析了T_c随N的变化。
AI.result: 在低温半填充条件下，系统存在绝缘电荷密度波（CDW）相，其中空位与N个粒子占据的位点交替排列。N=3时临界温度T_c最高可达N=2时最大值的两倍。
AI.conclusion: SU(N) Holstein模型在N>2时展现出比传统N=2情况更强的有序相（更高的T_c），这对理解冷原子实验中多组分费米系统具有重要意义。

title: A Gauge-Theoretic Formulation of Nambu Non-equilibrium Thermodynamics
summary:
We present a gauge-theoretic formulation of Nambu non-equilibrium thermodynamics (NNET).
  In this framework, the thermodynamic potential $A_{i}=\partial_{i}S$ plays the role of a gauge field: the reversible thermodynamics corresponds to the pure-gauge condition $F=dA=0$, while the irreversible entropy production arises from the emergence of curvature $F\neq0$. The gauge-fixing term, $A_{0}=\frac{1}{2}L^{ij}A_{i}A_{j}$ leads to Onsager's variational principle, whereas the Chern--Simons--like term $A\wedge B\wedge dt,\ B=dH_{1}\wedge dH_{2},$ naturally yields the framework of NNET.
  This formulation provides a unified geometric foundation for both reversible and irreversible processes in thermodynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种规范场论形式的Nambu非平衡热力学（NNET）框架。热力学势A_i=∂_iS扮演规范场角色，可逆过程对应纯规范条件F=dA=0，不可逆熵产生来自曲率F≠0。通过规范固定项导出Onsager变分原理，Chern-Simons类项自然给出NNET框架，为可逆与不可逆热力学过程提供了统一的几何基础。
AI.motivation: 将非平衡热力学纳入规范场论的几何框架中，统一描述可逆与不可逆过程，为NNET建立严格的数学基础。
AI.method: 将热力学势A_i=∂_iS视为规范场（U(1)规范理论），可逆过程对应曲率F=dA=0（纯规范），不可逆熵产生对应F≠0（有曲率）。引入规范固定项A_0导出Onsager变分原理，引入Chern-Simons类项A∧B∧dt自然得到NNET框架。
AI.result: 成功构建了NNET的规范场论表述，证明了Onsager变分原理和NNET框架可以从规范理论中自然导出。
AI.conclusion: 该规范场论形式为非平衡热力学提供了统一的几何基础，揭示了可逆与不可逆过程在几何上的本质区别（曲率有无），为热力学的几何化研究开辟了新路径。

title: Real-Space Mapping of Electronic Conductivity in Complex Materials
summary: We introduce KuboMap, a real-space representation of electronic conductivity derived from the Kubo-Greenwood formula. KuboMap defines a nonnegative conductivity density whose spatial integral recovers the total conductivity and whose form is guided by Mott's picture of transport through spatially overlapping electronic states. This construction provides a direct map of the transport-active regions of a material. Applied to aluminum, KuboMap recovers an extended metallic conduction network. Applied to amorphous silicon, it distinguishes an insulating defect-free network from a defective structure in which localized near-Fermi states form connected hopping-like pathways. In silicon-oxides, it captures the loss of conduction as increasing oxygen content disrupts Silicon-rich transport networks. KuboMap provides a physically transparent route from Kubo--Greenwood conductivity to real-space transport pathways in complex materials.

AI.tldr: KuboMap是一种从Kubo-Greenwood公式导出的实空间电子电导率表示方法，通过定义非负的电导率密度来直接映射材料中的传输活性区域，可区分金属、绝缘体及缺陷态中的导电通路。
AI.motivation: 传统Kubo-Greenwood公式只能计算总电导率，无法直观揭示材料中哪些空间区域真正参与电荷传输，尤其对于复杂材料（如非晶硅、氧化硅）中的局域态和缺陷态导电通路难以可视化。
AI.method: 基于Kubo-Greenwood公式推导出非负的电导率密度（KuboMap），该密度受Mott提出的通过空间重叠电子态进行传输的物理图像指导，空间积分恢复总电导率，从而实现对传输活性区域的直接映射。
AI.result: 在铝中恢复出扩展的金属导电网络；在非晶硅中区分了绝缘的无缺陷结构与缺陷结构中局域近费米能级态形成的跳跃式导电通路；在硅氧化物中捕捉到随着氧含量增加、富硅传输网络被破坏而导致的电导率损失。
AI.conclusion: KuboMap提供了一条从Kubo-Greenwood电导率到复杂材料实空间传输路径的物理透明路线，为理解材料导电机制提供了直观的可视化工具。

title: Monte Carlo physics-informed neural networks for inverse multiscale heat conduction problems via the phonon Boltzmann transport equation
summary: Inferring thermal fields and thermophysical properties from limited measurements is a fundamental challenge in micro- and nanoscale heat conduction, where the classical Fourier law breaks down and the phonon Boltzmann transport equation (BTE) is needed to capture non-diffusive transport effects. In this work, we extend Monte Carlo physics-informed neural networks (MC-PINNs), originally developed for forward phonon BTE problems [J. Comput. Phys. 542, 114364, 2025], to inverse multiscale heat conduction problems. Two representative classes of inverse problems are considered: (i) reconstructing the full thermal field from sparse interior temperature measurements when boundary conditions are unknown, and (ii) simultaneously inferring the unknown relaxation time together with the thermal field. Problem-specific MC-PINN architectures and training strategies are designed for each class. The mesh-free Monte Carlo sampling strategy enables a unified treatment across diffusive, transitional, and ballistic transport regimes without requiring a priori knowledge of the relaxation time. The proposed method is evaluated on quasi-one-dimensional, quasi-two-dimensional, and three-dimensional benchmark problems covering a wide range of Knudsen numbers, as well as on a realistic 3D fin field-effect transistor (FinFET) structure. Results demonstrate that MC-PINNs consistently outperform purely data-driven deep neural networks, particularly in the sparse-data regime, and can accurately infer spatially uniform relaxation times. For spatially varying relaxation times, the inferred distributions capture the dominant thermal response, and numerical simulations using the recovered parameters reproduce the macroscopic fields with good accuracy. These findings establish MC-PINNs as an effective and physically consistent framework for inverse thermal analysis at micro- and nanoscales.

AI.tldr: 本文扩展了MC-PINNs方法，用于解决微纳尺度热传导中的逆问题，包括从稀疏测量数据重建热场和同时推断热物性参数（弛豫时间），在多种维度及实际FinFET结构上验证了其优于纯数据驱动方法。
AI.motivation: 微纳尺度热传导中傅里叶定律失效，需采用声子玻尔兹曼输运方程（BTE）描述非扩散输运效应，但实际中只能获得有限测量数据，如何从中推断热场和热物性参数是基础性挑战。
AI.method: 将原用于正问题的MC-PINNs扩展至逆问题，针对两类逆问题（未知边界条件重建热场、同时推断弛豫时间和热场）设计专用架构和训练策略，采用无网格蒙特卡洛采样实现跨输运区域（扩散/过渡/弹道）的统一处理。
AI.result: 在准一维/二维/三维基准问题（覆盖宽Knudsen数范围）及3D FinFET结构上，MC-PINNs在稀疏数据场景下持续优于纯数据驱动DNN，能准确推断空间均匀弛豫时间；对空间变化弛豫时间可捕获主导热响应，且恢复参数仿真能高精度再现宏观温度场。
AI.conclusion: MC-PINNs为微纳尺度逆热分析提供了一种有效且物理一致的框架。

title: Sustainable photocatalytic CO2 conversion using microalgae as a carbon-negative scavenger
summary: Photocatalytic CO2 conversion driven by solar energy is a highly promising approach in addressing rising atmospheric CO2 levels; however, its practical application remains limited by low conversion efficiency. In this study, a new strategy to enhance CO2 reduction toward CO and CH4 is proposed through the employment of microalgae as a sacrificial agent, and the efficiency is compared with conventional CO2 conversion without and with the use of microplastics as sacrificial agents. To realize this strategy, an AB2O6-type high-entropy oxide (HEO), (Cs1/7Ba4/7Bi2/7)(Nb1/2Ta1/2)2O6, with bi-polymorphy of layered perovskite and pyrochlore, is rationally designed. The HEO incorporates alkali metal cesium and alkaline earth metal barium to increase surface basicity for CO2 chemisorption, bismuth with its stereochemically active lone pairs for localized polarization and charge separation, and tantalum and niobium to form octahedral crystalline frameworks for charge transport. The utilization of microalgae during photocatalytic reactions leads to a remarkable enhancement in CO2 conversion compared to catalysis with or without using microplastics, with CO and CH4 production increasing by 10- and 4-fold, respectively, compared to the system using only HEO. These findings not only demonstrate a new family of polymorphic AB2-type HEOs for photocatalysis but also show the potential of microalgae as a sustainable sacrificial agent, offering an environmentally friendly pathway for efficient CO2 capture (through photosynthesis by microalgae) and CO2 conversion (through photocatalysis by HEOs).

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用微藻作为牺牲剂增强高熵氧化物（HEO）光催化CO2还原的新策略，合理设计了具有双层钙钛矿和烧绿石双晶型的AB2O6型高熵氧化物，相比无牺牲剂或使用微塑料体系，CO和CH4产率分别提升10倍和4倍。
AI.motivation: 光催化CO2转化效率低是制约其实际应用的主要瓶颈，现有策略效果有限，亟需探索新的增强方法。
AI.method: 设计合成了一种具有层状钙钛矿和烧绿石双晶型的AB2O6型高熵氧化物（HEO），并引入微藻作为生物基牺牲剂，与无牺牲剂和微塑料牺牲剂体系进行对比实验。
AI.result: 使用微藻作牺牲剂时，CO和CH4产量相比纯HEO体系分别提升10倍和4倍，性能优于微塑料牺牲剂体系和无牺牲剂体系。
AI.conclusion: 证明双晶型AB2O6高熵氧化物是一类有前景的光催化材料，微藻可作为可持续牺牲剂实现CO2光合捕获与光催化转化的绿色协同路径。

title: NMR evidence for a loop-current state with broken $C_6$ symmetry in the charge-ordered CsV$_3$Sb$_5$
summary: Loop-current (LC) order and the associated time-reversal symmetry breaking (TRSB) are pivotal for understanding hidden magnetism and unconventional superconductivity in strongly correlated quantum materials. The recently discovered kagome metal CsV$_3$Sb$_5$ provides a unique platform for exploring these intertwined phenomena. In this study, we utilize $^{121}$Sb nuclear quadrupole resonance (NQR) and $^{51}$V nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) measurements to investigate the possible existence of the LC order in CsV$_3$Sb$_5$. Below $T^\ast \approx 45$ K, we observe a field-independent NMR linewidth broadening at the V site in a high-quality single crystal, which indicates an internal magnetic field of 3.6 Oe at the V position. We show that this internal field arises from a static LC state that produces orbital magnetic moments $μ_{\rm orb}$ ranging from 0.002 to 0.01 $μ_B$. Detailed analysis suggests that the observed LC state breaks $C_6$ rotational symmetry to possess a low symmetry of $C_2$. Our results provide microscopic evidence for LC order in the charge density wave (CDW) phase of CsV$_3$Sb$_5$ and show that TRSB is intertwined with electronic nematicity, imposing stringent constraints on microscopic descriptions of the kagome CDW and its relation to superconductivity.

AI.tldr: 通过核四极共振和核磁共振测量，在CsV₃Sb₅的电荷密度波相中发现了静态环路电流序，该序打破了时间反演对称性和C₆旋转对称性，产生约0.002-0.01 μB的轨道磁矩，为理解kagome金属中的隐藏磁性和非常规超导提供了微观证据。
AI.motivation: 探索kagome金属CsV₃Sb₅中环路电流序是否存在，以及其与时间反演对称性破缺和电荷密度波之间的关联，为理解强关联量子材料中的隐藏磁性和非常规超导提供微观基础。
AI.method: 采用¹²¹Sb核四极共振（NQR）和⁵¹V核磁共振（NMR）测量，对高质量CsV₃Sb₅单晶进行实验研究。
AI.result: 在约45 K以下观察到与磁场无关的V位NMR线宽展宽，表明V位置存在3.6 Oe的内磁场；该内磁场源自静态LC序，产生0.002-0.01 μB的轨道磁矩；该LC序打破了C₆旋转对称性，仅保留C₂对称性。
AI.conclusion: 为CsV₃Sb₅的CDW相中存在环路电流序提供了微观证据，表明时间反演对称性破缺与电子向列性相互交织，对kagome CDW的微观描述及其与超导的关系施加了严格约束。

title: Local spectroscopy of anyons bound to charge traps
summary: Fractional quantum Hall states host anyons, emergent quasiparticles with fractional charge and nontrivial exchange statistics. Controlling, trapping, and braiding anyons are central goals for both fundamental physics and topological quantum computation. A key step toward such control is understanding how anyons behave when confined in local potentials, where their internal structure can become relevant. Here, we use the scanning tunneling microscopy/spectroscopy (STM/STS) to study the excitation spectrum in integer and fractional quantum Hall states of monolayer graphene near individual charged impurities. In the integer quantum Hall states, the STS spectra show lifting of orbital degeneracy near defects, appearing as a band of discrete energy levels. In fractional states, (v=1/3 and 2/5), however, we observe an additional energy splitting of the lowest-energy spectral feature that occurs only when the chemical potential lies within a fractional gap and is absent in compressible or integer regimes. We attribute this to many-body configurations of anyons trapped by an impurity potential. Strikingly, numerical calculations show that the splitting requires an anisotropic confining potential, vanishing for a rotationally symmetric trap. The competing multi-anyon states carry nearly identical charge within the core of the potential but differ in how that charge is redistributed at larger radius. Our results establish local tunneling spectroscopy as a direct probe of anyon bound states, providing a key step toward understanding and controlling their behavior in confined geometries relevant for braiding and fusion.

AI.tldr: 本文利用扫描隧道显微镜/光谱学（STM/STS）研究了单层石墨烯中整数和分数量子霍尔态在带电杂质附近的激发谱。在分数量子霍尔态（ν=1/3和2/5）中，观察到了最低能谱特征的额外能级分裂，归因于杂质势阱中任意子的多体束缚态，且该分裂需要各向异性的约束势。数值计算表明，竞争的多任意子态在势阱核心携带几乎相同的电荷，但在更大半径处电荷分布不同。该工作建立了局域隧道谱作为任意子束缚态的直接探针，为理解和控制任意子在约束几何中的行为迈出关键一步。
AI.motivation: 控制、捕获和编织任意子是实现拓扑量子计算的核心目标。理解任意子在局域势阱中的行为（其内部结构变得重要）是实现上述控制的关键一步。
AI.method: 使用STM/STS研究单层石墨烯中整数和分数量子霍尔态在单个带电杂质附近的激发谱，并结合数值计算进行验证。
AI.result: 在分数量子霍尔态（ν=1/3和2/5）中观察到最低能谱特征的额外能级分裂，该分裂仅在化学势位于分数能隙内时出现，且需要各向异性的约束势。
AI.conclusion: 局域隧道谱可作为任意子束缚态的直接探针，为理解和控制任意子在约束几何（如编织和融合）中的行为提供了关键进展。

title: Intrinsic Magnetic Excitations and Heavy-Fermion Formation in the Frustrated Mn Pyrochlore System YMn$_{2+δ}$Zn$_{20-x}X_x$ ($X$ = In and Al) Revealed by Nuclear Magnetic Resonance and Nuclear Quadrupole Resonance Measurements
summary: We performed nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) and nuclear quadrupole resonance (NQR) measurements to investigate the microscopic electronic states of the $d$-electron heavy-fermion candidates $\mathrm{YMn_{2+δ}Zn_{20-x}In_x}$ and $\mathrm{YMn_{2+δ}Zn_{20-x}Al_x}$. In these compounds, magnetic fluctuations of the Mn pyrochlore lattice are expected to play an important role in heavy-fermion formation; however, excess Mn atoms complicate the interpretation of the physical properties. Our spectral analysis reveals that In substitution exhibits much higher site selectivity and introduces significantly less disorder in local structure than Al substitution. The temperature dependence of the nuclear spin-lattice relaxation rate divided by temperature $1/T_1T$ measured by $^{55}$Mn-NQR shows a clear enhancement at low temperatures, indicating the development of low-energy excitations associated with heavy-fermion formation. However, its absolute magnitude is approximately 20 times smaller than that in the related compound YMn$_2$, which hosts stronger antiferromagnetic correlations, indicating that the magnetic interactions are substantially weakened by the enlarged Mn-Mn distance. These results demonstrate that the heavy-fermion state in this system arises from the Mn pyrochlore network and is more closely associated with frustration-induced magnetic excitations with low energy than with conventional antiferromagnetic quantum-critical fluctuations.

AI.tldr: 本文通过NMR/NQR测量研究了YMn₂₊δZn₂₀₋ₓInₓ和YMn₂₊δZn₂₀₋ₓAlₓ的电子态，发现In替代具有更高的位点选择性和更低的无序性。低温下¹/T₁T增强表明重费米子形成，但幅度比YMn₂小约20倍，说明重费米子态源于Mn烧绿石网络的阻挫诱导磁激发，而非传统反铁磁量子临界涨落。
AI.motivation: 探究d电子重费米子候选材料YMn₂₊δZn₂₀₋ₓ(In/Al)ₓ中Mn烧绿石晶格的磁涨落对重费米子形成的作用，并澄清过量Mn原子对物理解释造成的干扰。
AI.method: 采用核磁共振(NMR)和核四极共振(NQR)测量，通过³⁵Mn-NQR谱分析和自旋-晶格弛豫率1/T₁T的温度依赖性测量，对比In与Al替代的效果。
AI.result: In替代比Al替代具有更高的位点选择性和更低的结构无序性；低温下1/T₁T显著增强，表明低能激发发展，但其绝对值比YMn₂小约20倍，显示磁相互作用因Mn-Mn距离增大而大幅减弱。
AI.conclusion: 该体系的重费米子态源于Mn烧绿石网络，与阻挫诱导的低能磁激发相关，而非传统的反铁磁量子临界涨落。

title: A Minimal Active-Particle Realization of Non-Hermitian Chern Bulk-Boundary Correspondence
summary: We show that a minimal frustrated Vicsek--Kuramoto active-particle model realizes a non-Hermitian Chern bulk-boundary correspondence. A Sakaguchi-type phase lag in the local heading alignment generates finite-wavenumber bulk instabilities and, under collision boundaries, robust one-way boundary flow. The organizing principle is a nonlinear saturation ansatz: the linearized hydrodynamic operator selects the unstable wavelength and spectral topology, while nonlinear particle dynamics saturates the selected mode. The isotropic continuum spectrum compactifies the wave-number plane and supports spectral projectors with Chern numbers $C=\pm2$, fixed by the spin structure of the dispersion matrix. Strip spectral flow then predicts chiral edge propagation, in agreement with particle simulations in the nontrivial sectors.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了最小化受挫Vicsek-Kuramoto活性粒子模型实现了非厄米陈数体-边界对应。通过Sakaguchi型相位滞后机制，在碰撞边界条件下产生稳定的单向边界流，其组织原理是非线性饱和假设：线性化流体动力学算子选择不稳定波长和谱拓扑，非线性粒子动力学使所选模式饱和。
AI.motivation: 探索活性物质中非厄米拓扑现象，特别是活性粒子模型是否能实现非厄米陈数体-边界对应，揭示活性系统中集体运动与拓扑物理之间的联系。
AI.method: 采用受挫Vicsek-Kuramoto活性粒子模型，引入Sakaguchi型相位滞后实现局部航向对齐；通过线性化流体动力学算子分析谱拓扑，结合非线性粒子动力学进行数值模拟验证。
AI.result: 发现各向同性连续谱使波数平面紧致化，支持陈数C=±2的谱投影子；条带谱流预测手性边缘传播，与非平庸区域的粒子模拟结果一致。
AI.conclusion: 证实活性粒子模型可实现非厄米陈数体-边界对应，为活性物质中的拓扑输运现象提供了理论框架。

title: Operando spectro-ptychography reveals dynamical charge-storage and degradation pathways in redox-active electrodes
summary: Electrochemical reactions at buried electrode-electrolyte interfaces govern how redox-active materials store and release energy. However, these reactions are difficult to visualize because chemical and morphological changes occur simultaneously over distinct length and time scales. Existing operando microscopies often require trade-offs among chemical sensitivity, spatial resolution and temporal resolution. Direct nanoscale tracking of such processes throughout extended timescale has therefore remained out of reach. Here, we develop a fast and robust operando soft X-ray spectro-ptychography platform that delivers chemical-state-resolved spatiotemporal movies of redox-active electrodes over the full battery lifetime. Applied to an alkaline Fe anode, the method reveals that reversible charge storage gives way to degradation through two competing processes: rapid hydroxide insertion that drives early reversible cycling, and slower dissolution-redeposition that redistributes Fe, enlarges FeOOH particles, and ultimately causes capacity loss. By separating fast charge-storage chemistry from slower degradation chemistry in operando and at both single-particle and particle ensemble level, this work establishes spectro-ptychography as a general approach for studying dynamic redox transformations in batteries, electrocatalysts, and other electrochemical materials.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种快速、鲁棒的原位软X射线光谱叠层成像平台，能够在电池全生命周期内生成具有化学态分辨的时空电影。应用于碱性Fe负极，揭示了可逆储电通过快速氢氧化物插层主导早期循环，而缓慢的溶解-再沉积过程导致Fe重新分布、FeOOH颗粒粗化和容量衰减。该工作将快速储电化学与慢速退化化学在单颗粒和颗粒集合体层面分离开来。
AI.motivation: 电化学界面反应难以可视化，现有原位显微镜在化学灵敏度、空间分辨率和时间分辨率之间需要权衡，无法在长时间尺度上直接追踪纳米级过程。
AI.method: 开发了原位软X射线光谱叠层成像（operando soft X-ray spectro-ptychography）平台，实现快速、鲁棒的化学态分辨时空成像。
AI.result: 揭示了Fe负极的两种竞争过程：快速氢氧化物插层（可逆储电）和缓慢溶解-再沉积（Fe重新分布、FeOOH颗粒粗化、容量损失）。
AI.conclusion: 光谱叠层成像可作为研究电池、电催化剂及其他电化学材料中动态氧化还原转化的一般性方法。

title: A one-parameter family of realizability-interior closures for odd-order kinetic moment systems
summary: Moment closures at odd truncation order present a fundamental difficulty: the standard Gramian closure saturates the realizability boundary, producing only weak hyperbolicity and failing to preserve Maxwellian equilibrium. We show that every odd-order closure for the one-dimensional kinetic equation admits a decomposition into a boundary term, given by the Schur complement of the Hankel moment matrix, and a positive margin above it. An exact polynomial identity connects this margin to the eigenvalues of the flux Jacobian, reducing hyperbolicity to a root-splitting problem. A dimensional argument proves that no margin depending only on density, velocity, and temperature can produce a hyperbolic system for $M \geq 5$. A one-parameter family $C_{η,n}$, $η\in [0,1]$, built from normalized Schur-complement ratios, reveals that the Morin-McDonald closure is the arithmetic endpoint. The weighted AM-GM inequality orders the family: the geometric endpoint ($η= 0$) is 2-4% more accurate on bimodal benchmarks, while the arithmetic endpoint ($η= 1$, Morin-McDonald) is the most robust. All members share the same equilibrium Jacobian, whose spectral radius is 13% ($M = 5$) to 29% ($M = 13$) smaller than Grad's closure, allowing larger CFL time steps. A linearized entropy exists for all $M$, and the BGK source dissipates it near equilibrium; a smooth nonlinear entropy exists for $M = 3$ but provably does not for $M \geq 5$. The closure is validated on bimodal and Mott-Smith benchmarks, achieving errors 10-40x smaller than the Gramian or Grad closures, and demonstrated in free-transport Riemann problems at $M = 5, 7, 9, 11$ and BGK Riemann problems at $M = 5$ and $9$.

AI.tldr: 本文针对动理学方程中奇数阶矩封闭的固有问题，提出了一类基于归一化Schur补比的单参数封闭族C_{η,n}，证明了Morin-McDonald封闭是算术端点(η=1)，而几何端点(η=0)在双峰基准测试中精度高2-4%，所有成员均比Grad封闭有更小的谱半径（允许更大CFL步长），且在M≥5时不存在仅依赖密度、速度和温度的全局双曲封闭。数值验证表明误差比Gramian或Grad封闭小10-40倍。
AI.motivation: 标准Gramian封闭在奇数截断阶处仅达到弱双曲性且无法保持Maxwell平衡态，这一根本困难限制了动理学矩方法的可靠应用。
AI.method: 通过Hankel矩阵Schur补分解将奇数阶封闭分解为边界项与正余量，利用多项式恒等式将双曲性转化为根分裂问题，构造单参数封闭族C_{η,n}，并用加权AM-GM不等式排序。
AI.result: 几何端点(η=0)精度更高（双峰基准2-4%），算术端点(η=1, Morin-McDonald)最鲁棒；所有封闭共享平衡Jacobian，谱半径比Grad小13-29%；M≥5时不存在全局双曲封闭；误差比Gramian/Grad小10-40倍。
AI.conclusion: 新封闭族在双曲性、平衡保持和精度上均优于传统方法，且数值格式允许更大CFL步长，为高阶矩方法提供了实用解决方案。

title: Developing fast, accurate and spin pure calculations of organic diradical electronic structure
summary: Organic diradical molecules have emerged in recent years as highly promising candidates for next generation optoelectronic and quantum information technologies. As efforts continue to synthesise diradicals with unique photophysical properties, developing our theoretical understanding of their complex electronic structure is crucial to enable rational design strategies. However, existing computational tools struggle to properly describe the multi-reference character of diradical electronic states while also preserving a low computational scaling that enables fast calculations on large emissive diradicals. This work presents a new computational method, termed Diradical Extended Restricted Open-shell PPP (D-ExROPPP) theory, which we show yields accurate and spin-pure electronic states at a very low computational cost relative to existing approaches. This is achieved by implementing a novel, spin-adapted configuration interaction approach within the semi-empirical Pariser-Parr-Pople framework. D-ExROPPP is then used to study the electronic structure of three prototypical organic diradicals, and benchmarked against results from computationally intensive, post-Hartree-Fock methods. Excitation energies for these molecules are predicted that show a similar level of accuracy as high-level ab-initio calculations, while requiring up to five orders of magnitude less computational time. We further apply D-ExROPPP to a number of recently reported stable, emissive, organic diradicals. In the majority of cases, electronic transitions measured in experimental UV-vis spectra are reproduced with qualitative accuracy and the spin states involved can be reliably assigned. Together, these results establish D-ExROPPP as a promising new tool for efficiently predicting and interpreting the photophysics of organic diradical molecules.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为D-ExROPPP的新计算方法，能够在极低计算成本下准确描述有机双自由基分子的电子结构，其激发能精度与高阶从头算方法相当，而计算速度快了五个数量级。
AI.motivation: 有机双自由基分子在光电和量子信息领域具有巨大潜力，但现有计算方法要么无法准确描述其多参考态电子结构，要么计算成本过高，难以应用于大型发光双自由基体系。
AI.method: 在Pariser-Parr-Pople半经验框架下，实现了一种新型自旋适配组态相互作用方法，称为D-ExROPPP理论。
AI.result: 对三种原型有机双自由基的激发能预测，精度与高阶从头算方法相当，但计算时间减少了五个数量级；对多个实验报道的稳定发光双自由基，能定性准确重现UV-vis光谱中的电子跃迁并可靠指认自旋态。
AI.conclusion: D-ExROPPP是一种高效预测和解释有机双自由基分子光物理特性的有前景的新工具。

title: Universal behavior of the condensation energy of Superconducting BCS Bose gases
summary: Using the Boson-Fermion formalism of superconductivity we calculate the condensation energy for several superconductors ranging from conventional to unconventional, or high temperature superconductors. It is calculated as the difference between the Helmholtz free energies of the superconducting and the normal state, which is a gas of N attractive electron gas, while the superconducting state is formed by the condensed Cooper pairs taken as composite bosons, coming from a fraction of the electrons inside the Debye shell, plus those electrons inside and outside the Debye shell that are unable to pair. After giving the analytic expressions for the internal energy U and the entropy S we obtain the Helmholtz free energy F = U -TS for both the superconducting and the normal states as functions of temperature. In the search for universalities, we calculate the ratio of the condensation energy at T=0 to the Sommerfeld constant (the normal state electronic specific heat over the temperature when T it's almost zero) using two different methods: the Boson-Fermion formalism developed here, as well as an analytical expression deduced from a combination of the BCS and Ginzburg-Landau theories. We find for the Boson-Fermion formalism $E_{cond}/γ_0= 0.252\,T_{c}^{1.997}$, which is the same behavior described by the experimental fit of Kim et al $E_{cond}/γ_0= 0.2\,T_{c}^{2.06}$ and by the one recently reported by Tallon et al for overdoped cuprate superconductors; while for the Ginzburg-Landau-BCS we get the expression $E_{cond}/γ_0= 0.236\,T_{c}^{2}$, also in very good agreement with the partifirst method.

AI.tldr: 本文利用玻色子-费米子超导理论，计算了从常规到非常规（高温）超导体的凝聚能，发现其与温度的平方关系与实验拟合高度一致，揭示了超导体的普适行为。
AI.motivation: 寻找超导体中凝聚能与温度之间的普适规律，解释从常规到高温超导体的统一行为。
AI.method: 使用玻色子-费米子超导理论，计算超导态和正常态的亥姆霍兹自由能差，推导内能和熵的解析表达式；同时结合BCS-Ginzburg-Landau理论给出另一种分析表达式。
AI.result: 玻色子-费米子形式得到 $E_{cond}/γ_0=0.252T_c^{1.997}$，BCS-Ginzburg-Landau得到 $E_{cond}/γ_0=0.236T_c^2$，两者均与Kim等人和Tallon等人的实验拟合结果高度一致。
AI.conclusion: 玻色子-费米子理论与BCS-Ginzburg-Landau理论在凝聚能-温度关系上给出了一致的普适标度律，支持了超导体中存在的普适行为。

title: Real-space Imaging of Quantum Hall Quasiparticles
summary: Quantum Hall systems host emergent quasiparticles with unusual charge, spin, and statistics, such as fractionally charged anyons. Although transport measurements have revealed many of their collective properties, identifying and visualizing individual quasiparticles remain elusive. Here we use scanning tunneling spectroscopy (STS) to image quantum Hall quasiparticles in graphene. Within incompressible quantum Hall states, we observe spatial variation of Landau level energies originating from electrostatic potentials created by charged defects in graphene and the underlying hexagonal boron nitride (hBN). For surface and near-surface defects, the Coulomb potential lifts the degeneracy of Landau orbitals, producing discrete energy splittings that reveal Landau orbital wavefunctions. In quantum Hall ferromagnetic states, quasiparticles bound to defect potentials produce distinct spatial and spectroscopic signatures that serve as hallmarks of the presence and number of localized excitations. In the fractional quantum Hall regime at one-third filling, our theoretical calculations predict discrete spectroscopic changes associated with the sequential addition of localized anyons, with a three-anyon bound state quantitatively reproducing our experimental data at $ν= 5/3$. These observations establish spectroscopic fingerprints of quantum Hall quasiparticles and provide a pathway toward imaging and manipulating individual anyons in real space.

AI.tldr: 本文利用扫描隧道显微镜（STM）直接成像了石墨烯量子霍尔体系中的准粒子，包括分数量子霍尔态中的任意子，通过观测朗道能级分裂和缺陷束缚态，建立了量子霍尔准粒子的光谱指纹。
AI.motivation: 虽然输运测量揭示了量子霍尔体系中准粒子的集体性质，但识别和可视化单个准粒子（尤其是分数量子霍尔态中的任意子）仍是一个挑战。
AI.method: 使用扫描隧道谱学（STS）对石墨烯中的量子霍尔准粒子进行成像，分析缺陷引起的库仑势对朗道轨道简并的解除，以及在分数量子霍尔态下（1/3填充）通过理论计算预测任意子局域化的光谱特征。
AI.result: 观察到表面和近表面缺陷导致的朗道能级空间变化和离散能级分裂；在量子霍尔铁磁态中，准粒子束缚于缺陷势产生独特光谱特征；在ν=5/3的分数量子霍尔态中，三任意子束缚态的理论预测与实验数据定量吻合。
AI.conclusion: 建立了量子霍尔准粒子的光谱指纹，为在实空间成像和操控单个任意子提供了新途径。

title: Kohn anomaly in a topological phase transition
summary: Topological crystalline insulators extend the concept of topological insulators by hosting surface states protected by crystallographic symmetry. Their topological phase transitions arise from spin-orbit-driven band inversion in the bulk electronic structure, reshaping the low-energy electronic environment and its coupling to lattice excitations. While the electronic aspects of band topology are well established, the corresponding dynamics of lattice and electron-phonon interactions remain largely unexplored. Here, we report a pronounced softening of a low-energy surface phonon mode across the topological phase transition in Pb0.77Sn0.23Se, revealed by temperature-dependent time-domain terahertz spectroscopy. Unlike the well-known phonon softening in ferroelectrics, this effect does not signal a structural instability but instead reflects electronic reconstruction. We attribute the softening to the Kohn anomaly, indicating a strong coupling between lattice vibrations and Dirac-like surface electrons in the topological phase. Consistently, the phonon linewidth deviates from the standard anharmonic temperature dependence, further evidencing enhanced electron-phonon coupling. Our results establish phonon softening as a spectroscopic signature of topological phase transitions and provide a route to distinguish topological and trivial phases.

AI.tldr: 通过时间分辨太赫兹光谱在Pb0.77Sn0.23Se中发现拓扑相变伴随表面声子软化，该软化源于电子重构而非结构失稳，归因于Kohn异常增强的电子-声子耦合，可作为拓扑相变的谱学指纹。
AI.motivation: 拓扑绝缘体的电子能带拓扑性质已被充分研究，但晶格动力学和电子-声子相互作用在拓扑相变中的行为尚不清楚，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用温度依赖的时间分辨太赫兹光谱技术，测量Pb0.77Sn0.23Se中表面声子模式随拓扑相变的演化。
AI.result: 观察到低能表面声子在拓扑相变处显著软化，声子线宽偏离标准非简谐温度依赖关系，表明增强的电子-声子耦合。
AI.conclusion: 声子软化可作为拓扑相变的谱学指纹，为区分拓扑相与普通相提供新方法。

title: Accelerating Chemical Potential Calculations with Minimal Normalizing Flows
summary: Chemical potentials are among the most important properties that can be obtained from a molecular simulation since they define many technologically relevant collective properties. The chemical potential of a species in solution is obtained by computing the free energy change of adding that species into a bulk system, a calculation typically very expensive for systems such as electrolytes, due to the lack of phase space overlap between "not-inserted" and "inserted" states. Recently, normalizing flows have been introduced as a way to accelerate free energy computations by learning a bijective function, constructed to be as expressive as possible, that maps the configuration space of one Boltzmann distribution onto another. This expressivity makes them difficult to train, limiting their ability to be generated "on-the-fly" for any new system, and in practice these mappings have shown only modest sampling improvements for liquids. We address these issues by introducing a "minimal" normalizing flow (MNF). This is a trainable bijective mapping that is intentionally limited in expressivity, and instead applies low-dimensional, physically informed transformations. Useful MNFs can be trained in 1 minute of GPU time due to their simplicity and our introduction of a novel training strategy. We show how calculations of chemical potentials of Lennard-Jones particle systems can be accelerated by at least 10 times with a simple radial mapping. We also apply a radial and orientational mapping to ion solvation in water, showing that MNFs can increase the effective sample size by 3 times for charging free energy calculations and 8 times for calculating free energy changes due to force field perturbations. This provides the foundation for the development of physically-informed mappings that can accelerate complex free energy calculations while retaining low training costs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种"最小化归一化流"(MNF)，通过低维、物理启发的变换来加速自由能计算，在Lennard-Jones粒子体系和离子溶液体系中分别实现了10倍和3-8倍的采样加速，且训练时间仅需1分钟GPU时间。
AI.motivation: 化学势是分子模拟中最重要的性质之一，但计算溶液中化学势需要计算自由能变化，传统方法由于"插入"与"未插入"状态间相空间重叠不足而计算代价高昂。现有归一化流虽然能加速自由能计算，但因其追求高表达力而难以训练，在实际液体体系中仅带来有限的采样改进。
AI.method: 提出"最小化归一化流"(MNF)——一种有意识限制表达力的可训练双射映射，采用低维、物理启发的变换（径向映射、径向加定向映射）。由于结构简单并引入了新的训练策略，MNF可在1分钟GPU时间内完成训练。
AI.result: 对于Lennard-Jones粒子体系，简单的径向映射使化学势计算加速至少10倍；对于水中离子溶剂化，径向加定向映射使有效样本量在充电自由能计算中提升3倍，在力场扰动自由能计算中提升8倍。
AI.conclusion: MNF证明了物理启发的低维映射可以在保持低训练成本的同时显著加速复杂自由能计算，为开发更高效的物理信息映射奠定了基础。

title: Intrinsic Defect Energetics and Fluorine Doping Effects in Li2CO3 and Li2O2: A First-Principles Study
comment: 30 pages, 7 figures, 9 pages of Supporting Information
summary: Lithium carbonate, Li2CO3, is a thermodynamically stable carbonate phase whose defect energetics are closely related to its stability and decomposition behavior in various lithium-based electrochemical systems. These properties of Li2CO3 are particularly important in lithium-oxygen battery environments. In these systems, Li2CO3 can form as a parasitic discharge product alongside Li2O2, the primary discharge product, leading to performance degradation. However, compared with Li2O2, the intrinsic defect thermodynamics of Li2CO3 and how chemical doping modifies its defect energetics remain insufficiently understood. In this study, first-principles calculations were performed to systematically analyze the intrinsic point-defect energetics of Li2CO3 and to evaluate the effects of fluorine doping on vacancy formation energies in Li2CO3 and Li2O2. Intrinsic defect analysis reveals that defect behavior is predominantly governed by lithium-related defects. Upon fluorine doping, lithium and carbon vacancy formation energies decrease selectively in Li2CO3, partially destabilizing the carbonate framework, while a reduction in lithium vacancy formation energy is also observed in Li2O2. These results suggest that fluorine doping modulates the defect energetics of both discharge products, potentially providing a thermodynamic basis for controlling the stability of Li2CO3 and Li2O2 under thermodynamic conditions representative of lithium-oxygen batteries.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算，系统分析了Li₂CO₃的本征点缺陷热力学，并评估了氟掺杂对Li₂CO₃和Li₂O₂中空位形成能的影响，发现氟掺杂可选择性地降低锂和碳空位形成能，从而调控放电产物的稳定性。
AI.motivation: 锂氧电池中Li₂CO₃作为副产物会导致性能衰减，但其本征缺陷热力学及化学掺杂对其缺陷能的影响尚不明确，因此需要系统研究。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算，系统分析Li₂CO₃的本征点缺陷热力学，并评估氟掺杂对Li₂CO₃和Li₂O₂中空位形成能的影响。
AI.result: 本征缺陷分析表明Li₂CO₃的缺陷行为主要由锂相关缺陷主导；氟掺杂后，Li₂CO₃中锂和碳空位形成能选择性降低，部分破坏了碳酸盐框架，同时Li₂O₂中锂空位形成能也降低。
AI.conclusion: 氟掺杂可调控Li₂CO₃和Li₂O₂的缺陷能，为在锂氧电池热力学条件下控制这两种放电产物的稳定性提供了理论基础。

title: A Differentiable DFT-Based Framework for Inverse Materials Design
summary: Discovering solid-state materials with target properties remains a central challenge in computational materials science. Existing approaches -- high-throughput screening, surrogate optimization, and generative models -- require extensive evaluations or training data and extrapolate poorly to unseen compositions. Here we develop a first-principles inverse-design framework, integrating reverse-mode automatic differentiation (AD) into KKR-CPA -- the Korringa--Kohn--Rostoker method with the coherent potential approximation -- where atomic compositions are continuous variables to be optimized. Reverse-mode AD yields gradients of objective functions with respect to composition at a cost independent of the number of candidate elements, enabling gradient-based optimization to identify materials from compositional spaces spanning dozens of elements. In this framework, any computable quantity can serve as the objective. We demonstrate this generality through two contrasting applications, magnetic alloys and half-metals, yielding candidates such as (Lu$_{0.553}$Yb$_{0.447}$)(Co$_{0.759}$Fe$_{0.241}$)$_2$Fe$_3$ and FeZr(Sb$_{0.94}$Te$_{0.06}$). Our framework offers a physically grounded route from a target property to the material that realizes it.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个基于第一性原理的反向设计框架，将自动微分技术集成到KKR-CPA方法中，通过梯度优化从包含数十种元素的组合空间中高效发现目标性能的固态材料，并在磁性合金和半金属两个案例中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法（高通量筛选、代理优化、生成模型）需要大量评估或训练数据，且对未见过的成分组合泛化能力差，无法高效地从广阔的组合空间中直接发现具有目标性能的固态材料。
AI.method: 将逆向模式自动微分（reverse-mode AD）集成到KKR-CPA方法中，将原子成分作为可优化的连续变量，通过梯度下降优化目标函数（计算成本与候选元素数量无关），实现从数十种元素的组合空间中直接搜索目标材料。
AI.result: 通过磁性合金和半金属两个案例，成功发现了(Lu₀.₅₅₃Yb₀.₄₄₇)(Co₀.₇₅₉Fe₀.₂₄₁)₂Fe₃和FeZr(Sb₀.₉₄Te₀.₀₆)等候选材料。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了一条从目标性能出发、基于物理原理直接逆向设计材料的有效路径，具有通用性和高效性。

title: Category Theoretic Framework for Chemistry I: a Tower of Chemistry
summary: Many laws of chemistry are exact within a limited scope and acquire a separate caveat outside it, and the caveats are usually treated as unrelated. This work argues that they share one cause. Each caveat marks a point where a question is asked of a description too coarse to answer it: the question belongs to a richer level of structure than the description carries. To make these levels explicit, the paper builds a tower of categories over the free symmetric monoidal category of a Petri net, the simplest categorical presentation of a reaction network. The levels, from the bottom up, are stoichiometry, thermochemistry, equilibrium, reaction kinetics, reaction mechanism, molecular geometry, and electronic structure. Each adds one kind of chemical content over the level below, and a forgetful functor runs back down. One question runs through the tower: what can a level express that the level below cannot? Answering it places each measurable quantity at the level where it lives, and identifies the content the levels below could record but not account for. The method is then turned on with two pieces of known chemistry. It recasts a classical criterion for when a reaction network has a unique stable equilibrium, the deficiency-zero theorem, as the rigidity of a single forgetful fibre. It also follows one familiar reaction up the tower: the ring opening that the Woodward-Hoffmann rules govern. At each level, from stoichiometry to electronic structure, the reaction becomes a distinct categorical object.

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建一个从化学计量学到电子结构的范畴层级塔，论证化学中许多看似无关的定律适用范围（caveats）实际上共享同一根源：每个适用范围标志着一个问题在一个过于粗糙的描述层次上被提出，而该问题本质上属于更高层次的结构。
AI.motivation: 化学中许多精确的定律（如热力学、反应动力学等）都有其适用范围，这些适用范围通常被视为彼此无关的孤立特例。作者认为这些适用范围背后存在统一的原因，即问题提出的层次与描述可提供的层次不匹配。
AI.method: 论文在Petri网的自由对称幺半范畴之上构建了一个范畴层级塔，从底部到顶部依次为：化学计量学、热化学、平衡、反应动力学、反应机理、分子几何、电子结构。每一层在下一层之上增加一种化学内容，并由遗忘函子（forgetful functor）自上而下连接。每个层次都能表达其下层所不能表达的内容。
AI.result: 通过该范畴塔模型，每个可测量量被定位到其所归属的层次；经典化学中的亏损零定理（deficiency-zero theorem）被重新解释为单一遗忘纤维的刚性；Woodward-Hoffmann规则的环开反应在各层次上被呈现为不同的范畴对象。
AI.conclusion: 化学定律的适用范围（caveats）统一源于描述层次与问题层次之间的不匹配，范畴论为理解化学系统的层级结构提供了一种形式化的统一框架。

title: Emergence of Quasi-two-dimensional Superconductivity in W-doped Bulk Noncentrosymmetric 3$R$-TaSe$_2$
summary: Noncentrosymmetric transition-metal dichalcogenides offer a rich environment for the study of unconventional superconducting phenomena. Here, we present a comprehensive analysis of single-crystalline W-doped 3$R$-TaSe$_2$, revealing weakly coupled anisotropic unconventional superconductivity at $T_c$ = 2.82(2) K, with an in-plane upper critical field exceeding the Pauli limit by 1.7 times. The angular dependence of the upper critical field, along with the observation of a Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless transition, reveals quasi-two-dimensional superconductivity. Crucially, magnetotransport reveals a distinct two-fold rotational symmetry within the superconducting state under in-plane fields, breaking the underlying three-fold lattice symmetry. These findings establish W-doped $3R\text{-TaSe}_2$ as a bulk model system for exploring intrinsic low-dimensional superconductivity and broken rotational symmetry, thus opening new directions for future quantum technologies.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了W掺杂的3R-TaSe₂单晶，发现其具有弱耦合的各向异性非常规超导电性（Tc=2.82K），面内上临界场超过Pauli极限1.7倍，并观察到Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless转变，表明准二维超导特性。关键发现是超导态下磁输运表现出二重旋转对称性，破坏了晶格的三重对称性，为研究低维超导和对称性破缺提供了块体模型系统。
AI.motivation: 探索非中心对称过渡金属二硫族化物中非常规超导现象的内在机制，寻找能够揭示低维超导和对称性破缺的块体模型系统。
AI.method: 对W掺杂的3R-TaSe₂单晶进行综合分析，包括上临界场的角度依赖性测量、BKT转变的观测以及磁输运实验以研究超导态下的旋转对称性。
AI.result: 发现弱耦合各向异性非常规超导（Tc=2.82K），面内上临界场超出Pauli极限1.7倍；观察到BKT转变，证实准二维超导；超导态下磁输运呈现二重旋转对称性，打破了三重晶格对称性。
AI.conclusion: W掺杂的3R-TaSe₂可作为研究本征低维超导和旋转对称性破缺的块体模型系统，为未来量子技术开辟新方向。

title: Layer-tunable Hubbard bands probed via moiré excitons in MoSe$_2$/WS$_2$ heterostructures
summary: Moiré superlattices in transition metal dichalcogenide heterostructures provide a highly tunable platform for engineering strongly interacting states at the nanoscale. However, quantitatively determining and in-situ tuning of the underlying Hubbard parameters remains experimentally challenging. Here, we report electric-field-driven reordering of layer-specific Hubbard bands by performing optical spectroscopy on a dual-gated, 60°-aligned MoSe$_2$/WS$_2$ heterobilayer. Using two spatially distinct moiré excitons as local optical probes and tracking them as a function of carrier filling and vertical electric field, we quantitatively extract the layer-dependent on-site Coulomb repulsions, U$_M$~60 meV in MoSe$_2$ and U$_W$~30 meV in WS$_2$. Furthermore, we stabilize generalized Wigner crystal and stripe phases by electrostatically tuning the system to a type-II band alignment, shifting the ground state into the WS$_2$ layer where reduced on-site repulsion allows inter-site Coulomb interactions to dominate. Our results establish vertical electric fields as a deterministic tuning knob for layer-selective Hubbard physics, enabling device-level control of complex many-body phases.

AI.tldr: 本文通过光学光谱技术，在双栅极 MoSe₂/WS₂ 异质双层中实现了电场驱动的层特异性 Hubbard 带调控，定量提取了层内库仑排斥能 U_M~60 meV（MoSe₂）和 U_W~30 meV（WS₂），并利用电场诱导 type-II 能带对齐，将基态转移至 WS₂ 层，从而稳定广义 Wigner 晶体和条纹相。
AI.motivation: 尽管过渡金属二硫化物异质结的莫尔超晶格为纳米尺度强相互作用态提供了高度可调平台，但定量确定和原位调控 Hubbard 参数（如库仑排斥能 U）仍是实验上的重大挑战。
AI.method: 采用双栅极 60°对齐的 MoSe₂/WS₂ 异质双层，利用两种空间不同的莫尔激子作为局域光学探针，在载流子填充和垂直电场变化下追踪它们，从而定量提取层依赖的 Hubbard U 值。
AI.result: 定量提取了 MoSe₂ 层的 U_M~60 meV 和 WS₂ 层的 U_W~30 meV；通过静电调控实现 type-II 能带对齐，将基态转移到 WS₂ 层，因该层库仑排斥较小，使得站间库仑相互作用主导，从而稳定广义 Wigner 晶体和条纹相。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明垂直电场是层选择性 Hubbard 物理的决定性调控旋钮，可在器件层面实现对复杂多体相的控制。

title: Spin-imbalanced fermion on a dynamic lattice
summary: We investigate the magnetic order of a one-dimensional spin-1/2 fermion dynamical lattice, where itinerant fermions are coupled to bond-centered localized spins via an Ising-like spin dependent hopping. The model provides an anisotropic dynamical extension of conventional spin-1/2 fermion systems, in which the motion of itinerant fermions is directly modulated by the configuration of localized spins. Using density matrix renormalization group simulations, we map out the ground state phase diagram in various parameter spaces. Depending on the interplay among the hopping dependent on localized spins, the longitudinal field, and the external Zeeman field, two distinct phases are obtained: a paramagnetic phase and a spin-density-wave phase. Most notably, in the partially spin-polarized fermion phase, the spin-density wave ordering wave vector exhibits two distinct phenomena, corresponding respectively to the nesting vectors $2k_{F\uparrow}$ and $2k_{F\downarrow}$ of the spin-resolved Fermi surfaces. We further demonstrate that the two spin-density wave phases are robust against the repulsive Hubbard interaction between itinerant fermions. Our results reveal a novel route for tuning magnetic modulations in one-dimensional correlated systems and enrich the microscopic understanding of dynamical lattice magnetism.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一维自旋-1/2费米子动力学晶格模型，通过密度矩阵重正化群模拟，发现了两相（顺磁相和自旋密度波相），并揭示了部分自旋极化费米子相中与自旋分辨费米面嵌套矢量对应的两种自旋密度波现象，这些相在排斥性Hubbard相互作用下依然稳健。
AI.motivation: 探索一维动力学晶格中局域自旋与巡游费米子耦合导致的磁性序，特别是Ising型自旋依赖跳变对电子运动的影响，理解新型磁调谐机制。
AI.method: 使用密度矩阵重正化群（DMRG）数值模拟，在多个参数空间中计算基态相图。
AI.result: 得到两种相：顺磁相和自旋密度波相。在部分自旋极化费米子相中，自旋密度波序的波矢分别对应$2k_{F\uparrow}$和$2k_{F\downarrow}$两种嵌套矢量。这些相在排斥性Hubbard相互作用下依然存在。
AI.conclusion: 该模型提供了一种调节一维强关联系统中磁调制的新途径，丰富了对动力学晶格磁性的微观理解。

title: Dynamic dissipative structures in bistable magnetic ordered spin crossover systems: self-oscillations of magnetization
summary: Dissipative systems can exhibit a variety of behavioral modes, ranging from complex deterministic chaos to the spontaneous emergence of ordered structures. A simple example of the latter is Benard cells. More complex examples include lasers, droplet clusters, the Belousov--Zhabotinsky reaction, and biological life. Of particular interest in the context of the formation of spatiotemporal dissipative structures are bistable systems with spin crossover. This paper discusses the possibility of observing self-oscillations of magnetization in magnetically ordered systems with spin crossover. The results of theoretical calculations of the nonlinear dynamics of bistable magnetic systems under nonequilibrium conditions are presented.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了具有自旋交叉的磁有序系统中磁化强度的自振荡现象，并展示了非平衡条件下双稳态磁系统非线性动力学的理论计算结果。
AI.motivation: 耗散系统可展现从混沌到有序结构的多种行为模式，其中具有自旋交叉的双稳态系统在形成时空耗散结构方面尤为重要，因此研究者希望探索此类系统中磁化强度自振荡的可能性。
AI.method: 通过理论计算对非平衡条件下双稳态磁系统的非线性动力学进行分析。
AI.result: 理论计算结果表明，在具有自旋交叉的磁有序系统中可以观察到磁化强度的自振荡现象。
AI.conclusion: 具有自旋交叉的双稳态磁系统在非平衡条件下能够展现出磁化强度的自振荡行为，这为耗散结构中自组织现象的研究提供了新的视角。

title: Spin-flip optical excitations in van der Waals antiferromagnet CrPS$_4$
summary: We investigate the near-infrared optical response of the semiconducting van der Waals antiferromagnet CrPS$_4$ and identify previously unreported spin-entangled optical resonances. The strong and anisotropic magnetic-field dependence of these resonances reflects the underlying magnetic order and confirms the biaxial antiferromagnetic nature of CrPS$_4$. From the magnetic field evolution of the optical transition, we extract key magnetic parameters, including the spin-flop ($\approx0.9$~T) and spin-saturation ($\approx8$~T) fields. These results demonstrate a potential pathway for all-optical probing of spin states in van der Waals antiferromagnets, with relevance for spin-sensitive optoelectronic and magneto-optical devices.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了半导体范德华反铁磁体CrPS₄的近红外光学响应，发现了此前未报道的自旋纠缠光学共振。通过强各向异性的磁场依赖性，确认了其双轴反铁磁特性，并提取了关键磁性参数（自旋翻转场~0.9T，自旋饱和场~8T），展示了全光学探测范德华反铁磁体自旋态的潜力。
AI.motivation: 探索利用全光学手段探测范德华反铁磁材料中自旋态的可行性，填补对CrPS₄近红外光学响应及其与自旋耦合关系的认知空白。
AI.method: 测量CrPS₄在近红外波段的光学响应，分析其在不同外加磁场强度和方向下的光谱变化，通过共振峰的演化推断磁性参数和自旋态。
AI.result: 发现了自旋纠缠的光学共振，其强各向异性磁场依赖性证实了CrPS₄的双轴反铁磁性质；提取出自旋翻转场~0.9T和自旋饱和场~8T。
AI.conclusion: 该工作展示了全光学方法探测范德华反铁磁体自旋态的可行路径，对发展自旋敏感的光电和磁光器件具有重要意义。

title: First-Principles Quantum-Spectral framework for Elementary Vortex Pinning in superconductors
summary: The critical current of a type-II superconductor is controlled by vortex pinning, whose microscopic input is the elementary pinning force. Scanning tunneling spectroscopy has shown that a defect pins a vortex by reorganizing the Caroli-de Gennes-Matricon (CdGM) states in its core, but why this spectral reorganization amounts to a pinning force has lacked a quantum-mechanical, first-principles account. Here we establish a transferable first-principles computational framework for elementary vortex pinning, in which defect-resolved DFT/Wannier electronic structures are embedded into a finite-box projected Bogoliubov-de Gennes free-energy formalism to convert quasiparticle spectral reorganization into vortex-pinning energies and forces. Using this framework, we confirm that the defect-induced reorganization of the vortex-core spectrum is the microscopic origin of the elementary pinning force. The force is evaluated as a finite-box vortex-insertion free energy whose four-configuration subtraction isolates the meV-scale interaction from much larger backgrounds. With the superconducting gap scale and vortex-core profile fixed from experiments, the FeSe Fe-site vacancy reproduces the microscopic STM value together with the measured spectral reorganization. All five point defects in FeSe and FeTe pin attractively, with FeTe Te-site vacancy strongest. Elementary vortex pinning thereby becomes a computable electronic-structure quantity, opening the first-principles screening of point defects toward higher critical currents.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了第一性原理计算框架，将DFT/Wannier电子结构嵌入有限盒Bogoliubov-de Gennes自由能形式中，将准粒子谱重组转化为涡旋钉扎能量和力，证实了缺陷诱导的涡旋芯能谱重组是基本钉扎力的微观起源。
AI.motivation: 尽管扫描隧道谱显示缺陷通过重组涡旋芯中的Caroli-de Gennes-Matricon态来钉扎涡旋，但缺乏量子力学第一性原理来解释这种谱重组为何构成钉扎力。
AI.method: 将缺陷分辨的DFT/Wannier电子结构嵌入有限盒投影Bogoliubov-de Gennes自由能形式中，通过四配置减法从大背景中分离出meV尺度的相互作用，评估有限盒涡旋插入自由能作为钉扎力。
AI.result: FeSe中Fe位空位缺陷成功复现了微观STM测量值与谱重组；FeSe和FeTe中所有五种点缺陷均表现为吸引性钉扎，其中FeTe中Te位空位最强。
AI.conclusion: 基本涡旋钉扎成为可计算的电子结构量，为通过第一性原理筛选点缺陷以提高临界电流开辟了道路。

title: Converging on bound states in coupled-channel calculations
summary: We develop a robust algorithm for locating bound states in coupled-channel calculations. Bound states exist at energies where an individual eigenvalue of a log-derivative or ratio matching matrix passes through zero. We describe an algorithm to identify the required eigenvalue of the matching matrix over the full range of energy where it exists. This allows much simpler programming than previous methods. We also consider the choice of the matching distance $R_\textrm{match}$, where the matching matrix is defined; coupled-channel methods are most efficient if $R_\textrm{match}$ is chosen to be in the classically allowed region for all channels that support bound states of interest, but not very close to a node in the wavefunction.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种用于耦合道计算中定位束缚态的鲁棒算法，通过识别匹配矩阵特征值过零点来简化编程，并优化了匹配距离的选择策略。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在耦合道计算中定位束缚态时编程复杂，且匹配距离（R_match）的选择缺乏明确指导，导致计算效率受限。
AI.method: 提出基于对数导数或比率匹配矩阵特征值过零点的束缚态定位算法，在全能量范围内追踪特征值轨迹；并分析了匹配距离的最佳选取原则，建议将其置于所有相关道的经典允许区域中，但远离波函数节点。
AI.result: 新算法相比传统方法编程更简单；匹配距离选在经典允许区而非节点附近时，耦合道方法计算效率最高。
AI.conclusion: 该算法提供了更简洁、高效的束缚态定位方案，同时给出了匹配距离的实用选择准则，有助于提升耦合道计算的整体性能。

title: Defect Engineered 2D MoS2 Materials for ML-enabled Neurotransmitter SERS Detection
summary: An attachment of catechol-containing neurotransmitter molecules is demonstrated on defect-engineered two-dimensional MoS2 platform, leading to activation of SERS due to molecular charge transfer. Mechanisms of neurotransmitters' bio-detection are discussed and Machine Learning methods are applied to distinguish spectra of structurally similar analytes. The SERS effect and selective docking of biomolecules are achieved through an optimized approach for defect engineering: namely, introducing the sulfur vacancies in MoS2 monolayer films via soft plasma etching led to molecular attachment driven by catechol functional groups. The quality of the sensor material was controlled by Raman, photoluminescence, and XPS characterization, thus allowing for optimization of the process of defect formation and achieving sensing selectivity. The sensor material showed no response to serotonin, confirming the specificity of attachment/SERS due to S-vacancies that regulate the strength of catechol-specific molecular adsorption. Defect-engineered MoS2 has enabled SERS detection of dopamine and epinephrine down to the sub-nanomolar range ($5\times10^{-10}$ M), with strong calibration reliability ($R^2$ = 0.95 and 0.99 for pure samples). PCA-LDA achieved 100$\%$ accuracy in distinguishing dopamine and epinephrine, which establishes defect-engineered MoS2 as a tunable, low-cost SERS platform for future sensing applications.

AI.tldr: 本文通过软等离子体刻蚀在单层MoS₂中引入硫空位，实现了儿茶酚类神经递质（多巴胺、肾上腺素）的选择性SERS检测，检测限低至亚纳摩尔级别（5×10⁻¹⁰ M），并结合PCA-LDA机器学习方法实现100%准确区分结构相似的分析物。
AI.motivation: 传统SERS平台存在成本高、选择性差等问题，难以有效检测结构相似的儿茶酚类神经递质分子。作者希望通过缺陷工程调控MoS₂表面，实现特异性分子锚定和增强SERS信号，结合机器学习区分相似分析物。
AI.method: 1) 采用软等离子体刻蚀在单层MoS₂薄膜中引入硫空位(S-vacancies)；2) 利用Raman、PL、XPS表征优化缺陷形成过程；3) 通过儿茶酚官能团驱动分子选择性吸附；4) 结合PCA-LDA机器学习方法区分多巴胺和肾上腺素的SERS光谱。
AI.result: 1) 对5-羟色胺无响应，证实硫空位驱动的儿茶酚特异性吸附；2) 对多巴胺和肾上腺素的SERS检测限达5×10⁻¹⁰ M；3) 校准曲线可靠性高（纯样品R²=0.95和0.99）；4) PCA-LDA区分多巴胺与肾上腺素准确率达100%。
AI.conclusion: 缺陷工程调控的MoS₂可作为可调谐、低成本的SERS平台，用于神经递质的高灵敏、高选择性检测，在未来的生物传感应用中具有广阔前景。

title: Automatic-differentiation-enabled dynamic parameter retrieval with sub-pulse-width resolution
summary: Time-resolved terahertz time-domain spectroscopy (THz-TDS) is a phase-sensitive tool in condensed matter physics for tracking photoinduced non-equilibrium dynamics of low-energy elementary excitations. However, the measured response function, optical conductivity $σ(ω,t_{pp})$, becomes unreliable in reporting the state of matter when material properties drastically change on a timescale comparable to or less than the probe pulse duration, obscuring the sub-pulse-width dynamics. To resolve this issue, we present a full-waveform inversion framework inspired by the multi-dimensional retrieval philosophy of frequency-resolved optical gating (FROG). By leveraging the automatic differentiation (AD) technique and the two-dimensional time-domain signal $E(t_{g},t_{pp})$, we show one can uniquely solve the inverse problem, at the sub-pulse-width resolution, of retrieving physical observables that are still well-defined, i.e., time-dependent scattering rate $γ(t)$, plasma frequency $ω_\mathrm{p}(t)$ and resonance frequency $ω_0(t)$, while the response functions are not. Further optimization by gradient-based routines (Adam + L-BFGS) via JAX makes the method exceptionally robust against experimental noise and probe pulse distortions. The validity of the AD-enabled methodology is benchmarked both by a self-consistent numerical approach and by experimental data from real ultrafast THz spectroscopy measurements.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于全波形反演（FWD）框架，结合自动微分（AD）与二维时域信号E(t_g, t_pp)，解决了太赫兹时域光谱（THz-TDS）在超快动力学中因探测脉冲宽度限制导致的亚脉冲宽度动力学信息丢失问题，实现了对散射率γ(t)、等离子体频率ω_p(t)和共振频率ω_0(t)等物理可观测量的亚脉冲宽度精度反演。
AI.motivation: 传统THz-TDS在材料性质在探测脉冲宽度时间尺度内发生剧烈变化时，光学电导率σ(ω,t_pp)作为响应函数会变得不可靠，无法反映亚脉冲宽度动力学过程，因此需要一种能够突破探测脉冲时间分辨率极限的反演方法。
AI.method: 借鉴频率分辨光学门控（FROG）的多维检索思想，构建全波形反演框架；利用自动微分（AD）技术处理二维时域信号E(t_g, t_pp)，求解亚脉冲宽度分辨率的逆问题；采用梯度优化算法（Adam + L-BFGS）通过JAX实现，提升抗噪性和鲁棒性。
AI.result: 该方法在自洽数值基准测试和实际超快太赫兹光谱实验数据中均得到验证，证明能够可靠地提取时间依赖的散射率、等离子体频率和共振频率等物理可观测量，且对实验噪声和探测脉冲畸变具有出色的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: AD驱动的全波形反演框架有效解决了超快THz-TDS中亚脉冲宽度动力学反演难题，为凝聚态物理中超快非平衡态研究提供了一种高精度、高鲁棒性的分析工具。

title: Lattice non-invertible symmetry from non-commuting transfer matrices
summary: We establish a direct connection between Onsager symmetry, duality defects, and quantum integrability in the XXZ spin chain at roots of unity, $Δ=(q+q^{-1})/2$ with $q^N=\pm1$. Using a non-Abelian algebra of transfer matrices governed by an unbalanced version of the Yang--Baxter/RLL relation, we construct an explicit lattice realization of the Onsager algebra and its duality automorphism. The duality is represented by a matrix product operator related to the transfer matrices of the $τ_2$ model. We show that this operator obeys $\mathbb{Z}_N$ Tambara--Yamagami fusion rules and therefore realizes on the lattice the topological defect lines of the free compactified boson conformal field theory. Our results identify non-Abelian integrability as a natural framework for the emergence of the Onsager symmetry and categorical dualities in lattice models.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了XXZ自旋链在单位根处Onsager对称性、对偶缺陷与量子可积性之间的直接联系，通过非交换转移矩阵代数构造了Onsager代数的晶格实现，并证明其满足Tambara-Yamagami融合规则，从而在晶格上实现了自由紧致玻色子共形场论的拓扑缺陷线。
AI.motivation: 作者希望将Onsager对称性、对偶缺陷（duality defects）与量子可积性这三个概念在晶格模型中统一起来，揭示它们之间深层的数学结构联系。
AI.method: 利用非平衡Yang-Baxter/RLL关系的转移矩阵非交换代数，构造Onsager代数的显式晶格实现及其对偶自同构。对偶算符用矩阵乘积算符（MPO）表示，该算符与τ₂模型的转移矩阵相关。
AI.result: 证明该对偶算符满足ℤ_N Tambara-Yamagami融合规则，从而在晶格上实现了自由紧致玻色子CFT的拓扑缺陷线。识别出非交换可积性可作为Onsager对称性和范畴对偶性在晶格模型中涌现的自然框架。
AI.conclusion: 非交换可积性（non-Abelian integrability）为理解晶格模型中的Onsager对称性和范畴对偶性提供了统一的理论框架，连接了可积系统、共形场论和拓扑缺陷等多个领域。

title: Fractional phase slips across the charge-density-wave domain walls in 1-T TiSe2
summary: The microscopic origin of the charge density wave (CDW) in 1\textit{T}-TiSe$_2$ remains controversial, with competing scenarios based on phonon-driven lattice instability and electronically driven excitonic correlations. Here, we combine low-temperature scanning tunneling microscopy with two-dimensional lock-in phase analysis to directly resolve the local CDW phase in real space and track its evolution across individual domain walls. In homogeneous regions, the CDW phase remains uniform; by contrast, across domain walls we uncover a robust and reproducible $2π/3$ phase shift that occurs collectively in all three symmetry-related CDW components. This nontrivial and correlated phase-slip configuration places stringent constraints on the order-parameter manifold and challenges the simplest purely phonon-driven commensurate lock-in picture, which would instead predict a $π$ phase shift. A minimal free-energy model incorporating both electron-phonon and electron-hole interactions reproduces the observed phase behavior and indicates that electronic interactions play an important role in shaping the local phase structure of the CDW order. These results establish domain walls as direct real-space probes of the microscopic interactions underlying multicomponent order and provide a general phase-resolved framework for constraining competing ordering mechanisms in correlated materials.

AI.tldr: 本文结合低温扫描隧道显微镜与二维锁相分析，在1T-TiSe₂中直接解析了电荷密度波（CDW）的局域相位结构，发现在畴壁处存在一个由三个对称CDW分量共同参与的2π/3相移，而非单纯声子驱动图像预期的π相移。结合自由能模型，表明电子-空穴相互作用在塑造CDW相位结构中起重要作用，为区分不同竞争机制提供了实空间探测框架。
AI.motivation: 1T-TiSe₂中CDW的微观起源长期存在争议，核心问题是其究竟由声子驱动的晶格不稳定性主导，还是由电子驱动的激子关联主导。现有研究缺乏直接的实空间相位信息来区分这些机制。
AI.method: 实验上结合低温扫描隧道显微镜（STM）与二维锁相分析技术，直接成像CDW的局域相位并追踪其穿过畴壁的演化。理论上构建包含电子-声子和电子-空穴相互作用的自由能最小化模型。
AI.result: 在均匀区域CDW相位均匀；在畴壁处，三个对称相关的CDW分量集体产生2π/3的相位滑移，而非纯声子驱动模型预期的π相移。理论模型表明电子-空穴相互作用对相位结构至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 发现的2π/3相移排除了最简单的纯声子驱动公度锁相机制，表明电子相互作用在CDW局域相位结构中扮演关键角色。畴壁可作为多组分序参量微观相互作用的直接实空间探针。

title: High-Performance Nanophononic Resonators in Self-Suspended WSe$_2$ Domes and Drums
summary: Van der Waals materials are ideally suited for the implementation of high-frequency nanophononic resonators with atomically flat interfaces. Here, we present two versatile van der Waals-based nanophononic architectures: First, we introduce self-supporting nano-domes of WSe$_2$ as a scalable platform for the simultaneous generation of hundreds of high-quality nanoacoustic resonators with resonance frequencies in the 100 GHz range. Second, we engineer self-supporting nano-drums that reach record-high working frequencies for 2D-semiconductor transducers beyond 1 THz. Through optical pump-probe spectroscopy experiments and photoelastic linear chain model calculations, we gain a detailed understanding of the intricate interplay between phononic mode hybridization across heterostructures, the differences between modes close to the center and edge of the acoustic Brillouin zone, and the temporal structure of the photoelastic response. Both architectures have potential applications in low-cost nanoacoustic probing and the ultrafast modulation of quantum emitters in two-dimensional semiconductors. While nano-drums surpass the THz frequency barrier, nano-domes appear as an accessible, low-cost alternative for developing scalable nanophononic technologies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了两种基于范德华材料的纳米声学谐振器架构：自支撑WSe₂纳米穹顶（100 GHz范围）和自支撑纳米鼓（超过1 THz），并通过光学实验和模型计算揭示了声子模式杂化、布里渊区效应等物理机制。
AI.motivation: 范德华材料具有原子级平坦界面，适合构建高频纳米声学谐振器，但现有方案在可扩展性、工作频率和成本方面存在局限。
AI.method: 实验上采用光学泵浦-探测光谱；理论上构建光弹线性链模型，分析异质结构中声子模式杂化、布里渊区中心与边缘模式差异以及光弹响应的时间结构。
AI.result: 纳米穹顶实现了数百个高质量100 GHz声学谐振器的可扩展生成；纳米鼓突破了1 THz工作频率的记录。
AI.conclusion: 两种架构分别面向低成本可扩展纳米声学探测和超高频（>THz）应用，未来可用于超快调控二维半导体中的量子发射器。

title: Macroscopic Fokker-Planck equation from microscopic Glauber dynamics for the Nagle-Kardar model
comment: 17 pages, 8 figures. Comments and feedback are welcome
summary: In the companion Letter we have highlighted the dynamical universality class of the Nagle-Kardar model, where a mean-field interaction is added to the one-dimensional nearest-neighbor Ising model. Starting from the microscopic Glauber dynamics, this paper provides a complete derivation of the Fokker-Planck equation that describes the time evolution of the macroscopic variables (magnetization and defect density) appearing in the model's Hamiltonian. The study of the Langevin equation, associated with the Fokker-Planck equation, allowed us to prove that the model belongs to the universal class of systems with diffusive dynamics and non-conserved order parameter (model A). To this goal, we used several features of the model at equilibrium, including the phase diagram and the fluctuations of macroscopic variables, which are here discussed for completeness. The derivation of the Fokker-Planck equation requires the solution of some combinatorial problems that appear in the counting of configurations at an intermediate level between the microscopic Glauber dynamics and the macroscopic Fokker-Planck one. Finally, we apply both the Glauber and the Langevin dynamics to the study of the average first passage time between local equilibrium states. We confirm that this time obeys an exponential Arrhenius law in terms of system's size, offering a direct link between microscopic energy landscapes and macroscopic relaxation mechanisms.

AI.tldr: 本文从微观Glauber动力学出发，完整推导了描述Nagle-Kardar模型宏观变量（磁化强度和缺陷密度）演化的Fokker-Planck方程，证明了该模型属于非守恒序参量的扩散动力学普适类（A模型），并通过第一通过时间的Arrhenius律建立了微观能量景观与宏观弛豫机制的联系。
AI.motivation: 确定Nagle-Kardar模型（一维最近邻Ising模型加入平均场相互作用）的动力学普适类，建立从微观动力学到宏观Fokker-Planck描述的完整推导框架。
AI.method: 从微观Glauber动力学出发，通过解决组合计数问题，在微观与宏观之间建立中间层次的构型计数，推导Fokker-Planck方程；进而研究关联的Langevin方程；利用平衡态相图和宏观变量涨落等特征验证模型属性；最后分别应用Glauber和Langevin动力学研究平均第一通过时间。
AI.result: 1) 成功推导出宏观变量的Fokker-Planck方程；2) 证明模型属于非守恒序参量的扩散动力学普适类（模型A）；3) 平均第一通过时间服从指数Arrhenius律，建立了微观能量景观与宏观弛豫的联系。
AI.conclusion: 该模型动力学属于模型A普适类，且微观能量景观与宏观弛豫机制之间存在直接联系。

title: A topology-tuned pressure valve across the isoreticular RHO zeolite family
comment: zeolites, isoreticular chemistry, phase transitions, soft nanoporous materials, molecular valves, effective Landau description, soft-mode transitions, enhanced sampling
summary: The isoreticular index of the eight-member embedded RHO zeolite hierarchy operates as a phenomenological design knob that tunes the mechanical critical pressure of the framework valve from $\sim 0.94$ GPa for parent RHO down to a predicted $\lesssim 0.03$ GPa for the largest member PST-28, more than an order of magnitude lower across a single family of synthesizable nanoporous solids. The molecular-valve effect that defines zeolite RHO (a reversible centric-to-acentric phase transition triggered by water, gas pressure, or mechanical loading) is shown here to be not a peculiarity of the smallest member but a generic property of the whole hierarchy, with a critical pressure that decays exponentially with the isoreticular order $k$. Combining lattice dynamics, full elastic-constant tensors, and finite-temperature free-energy reconstructions within a classical core-shell description of the pure-silica frameworks (independently validated against r$^2$SCAN+rVV10 density-functional theory on $G_1$ and $G_2$), we find that the entire family is well described by an effective mean-field Landau picture in which the framework distortion couples quadratically to the volumetric strain. We emphasise that $p_c$ is a mechanical (hydrostatic) critical pressure of the bare pure-silica framework, used as a proxy for the intrinsic framework softness and for the cation- and dehydration-driven response of the real aluminosilicates; it is not a gas-adsorption pressure. The exponential extrapolation places $p_c(G_6\text{-}G_8) \lesssim 0.1$ GPa (model-dependent band $0.03$-$0.15$ GPa), identifying the higher-order members as the softest, most stimuli-responsive frameworks of the hierarchy; whether this intrinsic softness translates into guest-driven switching at low gas activities will depend on the Al distribution, extra-framework cations and adsorbed molecules, and remains to be tested experimentally.

AI.tldr: 本研究揭示了八元环嵌入RHO沸石同构系列中，临界压力随同构序k呈指数衰减，从母体RHO的~0.94 GPa降至最大成员PST-28的预测值≤0.03 GPa，表明分子阀门效应是整个同构家族的普适特性，高阶成员是其中最柔软、最敏感的刺激响应框架。
AI.motivation: 探究RHO沸石家族中分子阀门效应（可逆中心-非中心相变）是否仅为最小成员的独有特性，以及该效应的临界压力是否可通过同构扩展进行系统调控。
AI.method: 结合晶格动力学、全弹性常数张量和有限温度自由能重建，采用经典核-壳模型描述纯硅框架，并用r²SCAN+rVV10密度泛函理论对G₁和G₂进行独立验证，构建有效平均场Landau理论分析框架畸变与体积应变的二次耦合。
AI.result: 临界压力pc随同构序k呈指数衰减，从~0.94 GPa降至预测的≤0.03 GPa；整个家族符合有效Landau模型；G₆-G₈成员的pc预测值为0.03-0.15 GPa。
AI.conclusion: 分子阀门效应是RHO沸石同构家族的通用特性，高阶成员具有极低的机械临界压力，是最柔软、最敏感的框架，但其在低气体活度下是否实现客体驱动开关仍需实验验证。

title: Residual orbital magnetization governs the anomalous Hall effect in altermagnets
summary: In altermagnets that exhibit anomalous Hall effect, the small remanent magnetization exists but has been treated as too small to be relevant to the Hall response. In this work, we point out that this dismissal is incomplete because the generalized Středa relation ties the intrinsic anomalous Hall conductivity ($σ_{xy}$) to the orbital magnetization ($M_z$, the topological component from the modern orbital magnetization) by $σ_{xy}=-e\frac{\partial M_z}{\partial μ}$. We reveal a microscopic mechanism to generate net orbital moment from the interplay of local crystal field and spin-orbit coupling for MnTe-type altermagnets, in which the magnetic anisotropy generates weak net magnetization without invoking exchange between neighboring spins (e.g., Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interaction). Our work indicates that residual orbital and spin magnetization is an intrinsic thermodynamic property that governs anomalous transport in unconventional antiferromagnets, including altermagnets and noncollinear antiferromagnets.

AI.tldr: 本文指出，在具有反常霍尔效应的交变磁体中，残余轨道磁化强度并非无关紧要，而是通过广义Středa关系与反常霍尔电导率直接关联，揭示了局域晶场和自旋轨道耦合产生净轨道磁矩的微观机制。
AI.motivation: 以往研究认为交变磁体中微小的剩余磁化强度与霍尔响应无关，作者指出这一观点不完整，因为广义Středa关系将反常霍尔电导率与轨道磁化强度紧密联系。
AI.method: 基于广义Středa关系 σ_xy = -e ∂M_z/∂μ 进行理论分析，揭示MnTe型交变磁体中局域晶场与自旋轨道耦合相互作用产生净轨道磁矩的微观机制。
AI.result: 发现磁各向异性可在不依赖相邻自旋交换作用（如Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用）的情况下产生弱净磁化强度；残余轨道和自旋磁化强度是交变磁体和非共线反铁磁体中反常输运的内在热力学性质。
AI.conclusion: 残余轨道和自旋磁化强度是反常反铁磁体中控制反常输运的本征热力学性质，不能忽略。

title: Spin modulations in the Rashba-Hubbard chain -- a tensor network study
summary: Uniform spin-orbit coupling in an open single-band Hubbard chain is an exactly removable \(SU(2)\) gauge field at the Hamiltonian level, but not at the level of laboratory-frame spin correlations. We study this separation using density matrix renormalization group calculations for the repulsive one-dimensional Rashba-Hubbard chain. For open boundary conditions, a site-dependent spin rotation maps the model with hopping \(t\) and Rashba spin-orbit strength \(λ\) onto the ordinary Hubbard chain with renormalized hopping \(t_λ=\sqrt{t^2+λ^2}\). Consequently, charge and energy diagnostics are affected only through the bandwidth renormalization, which is quadratic in weak \(λ/t\).
